fields.name: The Weatherproof Trench Coat
fields.short_description: Water-repellent organic gabardine trench coat tailored in London.
fields.description: Crafted from heavyweight organic cotton gabardine woven in Biella, this architectural trench coat features taped seams, horn buttons, and a removable merino wool lining for year-round versatility.
fields.meta_title: The Weatherproof Trench Coat | House of Bore
fields.meta_description: Shop the weatherproof organic gabardine trench coat with merino wool lining.

fields.name: Heavyweight Scottish Cashmere Turtleneck
fields.short_description: Four-ply Scottish cashmere turtleneck sweater in deep charcoal.
fields.description: Spun and knitted by master artisans in the Scottish Highlands, this heavyweight four-ply cashmere turtleneck offers exceptional thermal insulation and a sumptuous hand feel that softens with every wear.
fields.meta_description: Four-ply Scottish cashmere turtleneck sweater engineered for cold climates.

fields.name: Bench-Made Leather Chelsea Boots
fields.short_description: Florentine vegetable-tanned calfskin Chelsea boots with Goodyear welt.
fields.description: Hand-lasted in Florence using full-grain vegetable-tanned leather, these timeless Chelsea boots feature a robust Goodyear welt construction, breathable cork footbed, and discreet rubber outsoles for urban longevity.
fields.meta_title: Bench-Made Leather Chelsea Boots | Modern Essentials
fields.meta_description: Hand-lasted Florentine calfskin Chelsea boots with Goodyear welt construction.

fields.name: Full-Grain Leather Weekender Duffel
fields.short_description: Vegetable-tanned archival weekender bag engineered for lifelong travel.
fields.description: Constructed from thick Tuscan saddle leather and solid brass hardware, this cabin-friendly weekender bag is designed to endure decades of global travel while developing a profound personalized patina.
fields.meta_title: Full-Grain Leather Weekender Duffel | House of Bore
fields.meta_description: Vegetable-tanned Tuscan saddle leather travel bag with solid brass hardware.

fields.name: Japanese Selvedge Denim Overshirt
fields.short_description: 14oz Okayama raw selvedge denim overshirt with custom copper rivets.
fields.description: Woven on vintage Toyoda shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan, this unwashed 14oz selvedge denim overshirt functions as sturdy lightweight outerwear or an architectural mid-layer.
fields.meta_title: Japanese Selvedge Denim Overshirt | Apex Wear
fields.meta_description: 14oz Okayama raw selvedge denim overshirt woven on vintage shuttle looms.

fields.name: Unstructured Italian Merino Blazer
fields.short_description: Half-canvas unstructured blazer tailored from Biella merino wool.
fields.description: Offering the formality of Savile Row tailoring with the comfort of knitwear, this unstructured two-button blazer is cut from lightweight super 130s Italian merino wool with horn buttons and patch pockets.
fields.meta_title: Unstructured Italian Merino Blazer | House of Bore
fields.meta_description: Half-canvas unstructured blazer tailored from super 130s Biella merino wool.

fields.name: Pleated Italian Wool Trousers
fields.short_description: Single-pleat relaxed trousers tailored in navy gabardine.
fields.description: Designed with a high rise and subtle single pleat, these relaxed trousers feature side adjuster tabs and a graceful taper, crafted from breathable Italian wool gabardine.
fields.meta_title: Pleated Italian Wool Trousers | House of Bore
fields.meta_description: Single-pleat relaxed trousers tailored in navy Italian wool gabardine.

fields.name: Draped Silk Charmeuse Blouse
fields.short_description: 100% mulberry silk charmeuse blouse with mother-of-pearl buttons.
fields.description: Cut from lustrous 22-momme mulberry silk charmeuse, this fluid blouse features an elongated collar, French cuffs, and genuine mother-of-pearl button closures.
fields.meta_title: Draped Silk Charmeuse Blouse | House of Bore
fields.meta_description: 100% mulberry silk charmeuse blouse with mother-of-pearl buttons.

fields.name: Minimalist Suede Loafers
fields.short_description: Unlined calf suede penny loafers handcrafted in Tuscany.
fields.description: Handmade in Tuscany from supple unlined calf suede, these featherweight penny loafers mold instantly to the foot, featuring leather soles and stacked heels.
fields.meta_description: Unlined Tuscan calf suede penny loafers with leather soles.

fields.name: Tactile Scottish Wool Throw
fields.short_description: Heavyweight lambswool blanket woven in traditional herringbone.
fields.description: Woven in Scotland from first-clip lambswool, this generously proportioned throw blanket offers immense warmth and tactile richness, finished with rolled fringes.
fields.meta_title: Tactile Scottish Wool Throw | North Trail
fields.meta_description: Heavyweight lambswool blanket woven in Scotland with rolled fringes.

fields.name: Metropolitan Technical Parka
fields.short_description: Waterproof three-layer membrane parka with magnetic closures.
fields.description: Engineered for severe winter precipitation, this technical parka combines a breathable three-layer waterproof membrane with recycled goose down insulation and storm cuffs.
fields.meta_description: Waterproof three-layer membrane winter parka with recycled down insulation.

fields.name: Low-Profile Leather Trainers
fields.short_description: Minimalist full-grain white leather sneakers with Margom rubber soles.
fields.description: The quintessential minimal trainer, handcrafted from full-grain Italian calfskin and mounted on durable Margom rubber cup-soles with padded leather collars.
fields.meta_description: Minimalist full-grain Italian leather sneakers with Margom rubber soles.

fields.name: Structured Leather Briefcase
fields.short_description: Double-gusset bridle leather briefcase with solid brass locks.
fields.description: An architectural business portfolio crafted from English bridle leather. Features two spacious compartments, padded laptop sleeve, and custom brass combination locks.
fields.meta_title: Structured Leather Briefcase | House of Bore
fields.meta_description: Double-gusset English bridle leather briefcase with brass locks.

fields.name: Ribbed Cashmere Beanie
fields.short_description: Heavyweight ribbed knit beanie spun from Scottish cashmere.
fields.description: Knitted in Scotland from six-ply cashmere yarn, this heavyweight ribbed beanie provides unmatched softness and insulation during cold winter commutes.
fields.meta_description: Heavyweight six-ply ribbed knit beanie spun from Scottish cashmere.

fields.name: Archival Gabardine Car Coat
fields.short_description: Single-breasted water-resistant wool car coat from our archives.
fields.description: An archival silhouette reissued in limited quantities. Tailored from water-resistant wool gabardine with raglan sleeves and hidden horn button placket.
fields.meta_title: Archival Gabardine Car Coat | House of Bore
fields.meta_description: Single-breasted water-resistant wool car coat with raglan sleeves.

fields.name: Lightweight Linen Overshirt
fields.short_description: Garment-dyed Normandy linen shirt jacket with chest pockets.
fields.description: Woven from certified Normandy flax and garment-dyed for a relaxed, lived-in texture, this lightweight overshirt is essential for warm climate layering.
fields.meta_description: Garment-dyed Normandy linen shirt jacket with chest patch pockets.
